input.background: For several African countries, data on the number of physicians (per 10,000 population) and the infant mortality rate (number of deaths of infants less than one year old per 1,000 live births) are recorded. The data is presented in a table format for countries A to Q.
input.question: Draw a scatterplot of the data.

output.answer: Negative relationship between infant mortality rate and the number of physicians in African countries.

meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
